command-desc: Open vanilla role & privilege manager UI
select-role: Select a role on the left
claim-hint: Players with role: {0}. Allowance is in chunks (written to serverconfig as LandClaimAllowance chunks). 0 = unlimited.
message-claim-minsize-set: Min claim size of {0} set to {1}×{2}×{3}.
message-claim-settings-set: Claim settings for {0}: level {1}, {2} chunks, {3} areas, min {4}×{5}×{6}.
error-invalid-numbers: Enter valid integers for level / claim fields.
priv-hint:
LMB — select privilege (description).
RMB — grant, RMB again — revoke.
delete-confirm-hint: Click Delete again to remove role "{0}".
diff-pick-hint: Click another role in the list to compare (B).
diff-ready: Diff A={0}  B={1}. Markers A/B/A+B on privileges.
priv-use-buttons: Use Grant / Revoke under the list to change.
error-select-privilege: Select a privilege in the list first.
message-role-created: Role "{0}" ({1}) created and saved to serverconfig.
message-claim-allowance-set: Land claim allowance of {0} set to {1} chunks.
message-claim-areas-set: Max claim areas of {0} set to {1}.
error-no-manage: Need controlserver, grantrevoke or root to manage roles.
error-role-protected: Role "{0}" is protected and cannot be deleted.
error-privilege-already: Privilege {0} is already on this role.
error-privilege-missing: Privilege {0} is not on this role.
error-player-offline-role: Could not set role for offline player {0}.
error-open-failed: Failed to open manager. See client log.
priv-useblock-desc: Interact with blocks (doors, chests, machines, etc.).
priv-buildblockseverywhere-desc: Build ignoring land claims. Still needs creative mode.
priv-useblockseverywhere-desc: Use blocks ignoring land claims. Still needs creative mode.
priv-attackcreatures-desc: Damage animals and other non-player creatures.
priv-whitelist-desc: Add or remove players from the whitelist.
priv-readlists-desc: View client, group, ban and area lists.
priv-give-desc: Give items and blocks with commands.
priv-setspawn-desc: Set the default world spawn point.
priv-controlserver-desc: Restart/shutdown, reload mods, change server settings.
priv-grantrevoke-desc: Assign roles and privileges to others (same or lower level only).
priv-commandplayer-desc: Run commands that target other players (tp, gamemode, …).
priv-controlplayergroups-desc: Join, leave, invite and op your own player groups / chat channels.
priv-manageplayergroups-desc: Create and disband your own player groups.
